---
title: "portfolioacty"
---

Hello! My name is Luc and I am a \*\*Master's student in Statistics & Risk Economics\*\* at Paris Nanterre University, specializing in Data Science and Actuarial track.

Passionate about making data speak, this website showcases my academic and personal projects in statistics, econometrics, and data science.

📬 \*\*Looking for a 1 or 2-year apprenticeship starting September 2026.\*\*

Feel free to explore my \[Projects\](projects.qmd) page or check out my \[GitHub Profile\](https://github.com/luc-zhan).
